scope: issue #199 stream runner: all 114 public Gorgias operations remain accounted for; 24 safe list/read-sweep GET endpoints are executable as ETL streams, while detail direct reads, binary/file operations, advanced POST queries, reverse-ETL, admin, destructive, and product-scope operations remain blocked metadata until their dedicated lanes add typed behavior and safety gates.
